ReferenceCustomerBuyer.description: Shared identifier of the customer who pays. Defaults to ReferenceCustomer if omitted.

AmountUpFront.description: Override the upfront/setup fee in cents

AmountTrial.description: Override the trial period amount in cents

UnitTrial.description: Override the trial period time unit

AmountRecurrence.description: Override the recurring amount in cents

Features.description: Feature overrides — same structure as subscription.override
